title: light flaky earthy middle-eastern fish flatbread
description: a delicate and flavorful flatbread topped with a tangy gherkin relish and a sprinkle of sumac.

ingredients.name: gills of sea bass
ingredients.notes: scaled and boned, cut into small pieces

instructions: in a large mixing bowl, combine yeast and warm water and let sit for 5 minutes until frothy
add flour, salt, and olive oil to the bowl and mix until a shaggy dough forms
knead the dough on a floured surface for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic
place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour until doubled in size
punch down the dough and shape into a disk, place on a baking sheet
bake for 15-20 minutes until golden brown
while the flatbread is baking, mix the gherkin relish and sumac in a small bowl
spread the gherkin relish on the flatbread and sprinkle with parsley
top with gills of sea bass
